arts.ttl: ‘Wow’: Kasper Schmeichel says Chelsea have a defender with so much potential
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel has played with some truly brilliant players during his career. From Riyad Mahrez and N’Golo Kante to Christian Eriksen and Joachim Andersen, Schmeichel...

arts.ttl: Ian Maxwell tells Rangers exactly what is next for SFA after Celtic penalty howler as 'unfair' theory clamped on air
arts.sum: The SFA supremo was in the firing line after a horror week for match officials

arts.ttl: Andy Walker says Celtic may start fringe man he's always been 'impressed' by vs Dundee Utd
arts.sum: Celtic take on Dundee United at Tannadice tomorrow and there is plenty of excitement ahead of Brendan Rodgers’ men returning to Scottish Premiership action. Speaking on the Go Radio Football Show, Walker believes Celtic star Anthony Ralston is someone Rodgers should have no qualms throwing in against Dundee United tomorrow afternoon.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton outlines why he's sceptical about Kieran Tierney to Celtic transfer
arts.sum: Celtic legend Chris Sutton admits he's sceptical about the prospect of Kieran Tierney returning to the club.

arts.ttl: What Marvin Bartley said off-air about Kieran Tierney returning to Celtic
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney at his age can go and earn more money elsewhere, I think he can give the Premier League another crack. Speaking on Clyde 1 Superscoreboard, Bartley said off-air that Tierney would be a ‘fantastic’ asset should he arrive back at Celtic, but believes he could also opt to further his financial earning potential by staying south of the border.

arts.ttl: Andy Walker delivers clear verdict on Greg Taylor Celtic future and contract situation
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has work to do regarding Greg Taylor’s future at the club amid his uncertain contract status. If Kieran Tierney is fit and available and wants to come back to Celtic, he would play in front of Greg Taylor.

arts.ttl: Former Celtic boss Ronny Deila lands next managerial role and is 'eager' to make an instant impact
arts.sum: Returning to Major League Soccer, Deila has been appointed as Atlanta United’s new manager ahead of the forthcoming campaign. Ronny Deila appointed as Atlanta United’s new boss

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton has his say on Celtic's chances of landing Kieran Tierney as return links escalate
arts.sum: Earlier this week, news emerged that Celtic are targeting Kieran Tierney after Arsenal opted not to activate his one-year contract extension clause, leaving the Scotland international set to become a free agent next summer. Chris Sutton has his say on potential Kieran Tierney Celtic move

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings continues superb Celtic B form in thumping Friday night victory
arts.sum: The 27-year-old is free to discuss a pre-contract from January, but the Irishman still retains hope he will commit his future to the club. Another man who falls into that category is Celtic B star Daniel Cummings, who has enjoyed some excellent form in front of goal this season under Stephen McManus .

arts.ttl: I'm all for Rangers Cup Final replay if they let me dig out my boots to do 2003 Celtic clash over again – Chris Sutton
arts.sum: The controversy has sparked a drastic solution - which the Hoops hero has surprisingly backed
